notes: Comprehensive evidence-based review: catechins, cardiovascular, cognitive, metabolic benefits; updated July 2025
PMC literature review: beneficial effects of green tea across multiple health domains

Meta-analysis (18 studies, 58929 participants): green tea consumption associated with 37% reduced cognitive impairment risk (OR 0.63, 95% CI 0.54-0.73); Neuroepidemiology 2025; confirmed still supports the claim

Meta-analysis 38 prospective cohort datasets, 1.96M participants; tea 3+ times/week associated with 22% lower CVD mortality (RR 0.86, 95% CI 0.79-0.94); Epidemiology and Health 2024; new reference supporting cardiovascular health section
